note: seq=113: ⭐ SMART WEBSITE DISCOVERY (Tier-2, the #1 lever: 31% website -> higher). Runs on website-LESS records. M4 parse source_record payloads for an existing url/website field ($0, no crawl, no false-match -- many registry/Socrata rows already carry a URL we never extracted); M5 email-domain -> website; M1 corroborated name-permutation (name-token+city must appear on the page -> kills A&R-Markets->markets.com false matches). Sets website + provenance(website_discovery); publishes website-discovery.json with the measured before/after website%. M2 search-API (Brave/Bing, needs free key) + M3 Common Crawl reverse-lookup are next. ALSO: backup pg_dump-path fix (find the PG client binary, set ATLAS_PG_DUMP in db.env, re-run the backup) -- 0 dumps was likely a PATH miss. Verified complete (138L, __main__, compile).

steps.note: seq=113: website-discovery Tier-2 enricher (measure website% lift) + backup pg_dump path fix.

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/importers/atlas_website_discovery.py':'b4245a29c88e3de8edb000c046a16b70469e35fd5278aea323a6e4003ab4e9c3'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('wsd sha ok')"

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS Tier-2 website discovery (payload+email+corroborated permutation)
After=network-online.target postgresql.service

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Nice=15
IOSchedulingClass=idle
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/db.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/audit.env
Environment=WSD_BATCH=20000
Environment=WSD_CRAWL=1
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/importers/atlas_website_discovery.py
TimeoutStartSec=1200

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS website-discovery hourly

[Timer]
OnBootSec=4min
OnUnitActiveSec=1h
Persistent=true

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target

steps.cmd:
/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import glob,os,subprocess as s; cands=glob.glob('/usr/lib/postgresql/*/bin/pg_dump')+glob.glob('/usr/pgsql-*/bin/pg_dump')+['/usr/bin/pg_dump','/usr/local/bin/pg_dump']; pd=next((p for p in cands if os.path.exists(p)),None); open('/etc/atlas/db.env','a').write('
ATLAS_PG_DUMP=%s
ATLAS_PG_RESTORE=%s
'%(pd,pd.replace('pg_dump','pg_restore'))) if pd else None; print('pg_dump found:',pd); s.run(['systemctl','reset-failed','atlas-backup.service']); s.run(['systemctl','start','--no-block','atlas-backup.service']) if pd else print('NO pg_dump on box -- needs postgresql-client install (box access)')"

/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import os,subprocess as s; keys=['STATUS_TOKEN','STATUS_REPO','STATUS_API_BASE','STATUS_BRANCH','NODE_ID']; open('/etc/atlas/audit.env','w').write(chr(10).join('%s=%s'%(k,os.environ[k]) for k in keys if os.environ.get(k))+chr(10)); os.chmod('/etc/atlas/audit.env',0o600); s.run(['systemctl','daemon-reload']); s.run(['systemctl','enable','atlas-website-discovery.timer']); s.run(['systemctl','start','atlas-website-discovery.timer']); s.run(['systemctl','reset-failed','atlas-website-discovery.service']); s.run(['systemctl','start','--no-block','atlas-website-discovery.service']); print('website-discovery live + running')"
